fixture_scope.notes: Gary provided real project files for Project_R 8.D project quality testing. The files intentionally cover multiple source formats and may not belong to the same real project; project number or project name mismatch is not a regression failure.

cases.description: Validate PDF drawing extraction can answer a Level 17 window-count question and cite the drawing source.

cases.description: Validate PDF window schedule extraction can answer W19 size for L3-15.
cases.query: L3-15 W19这个窗的宽高尺寸是多少？

expected_answer.notes: Use this case to verify drawing/table extraction and page-level citation.

cases.notes: MiMo V2.5 cannot extract CAD-style window schedule table rows. 4-page vision forced, model outputs general description. Accepted as model capability boundary (mimo_v2_5_visual_table_limit).
